title: Nicodemia diversifolia
taxonomy: Nicodemia diversifolia is classified as a species of flowering plant in the family Achariaceae. It is a plant species native to New Caledonia. The classification of Nicodemia diversifolia is based on its botanical characteristics, including its leaf morphology and fruit structure. This plant is also known by its other name, Achariaceae family member, but its more specific classification is within the genus Nicodemia. The classification system used for Nicodemia diversifolia is the binomial nomenclature, developed by Carl Linnaeus.
uses: Nicodemia diversifolia, a plant native to certain regions, has been traditionally used in folk medicine.
